prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Mercedes-AMG M08 EQ Power+ (1.6L V6 turbo hybrid, PU106C)** with a **Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger** (custom billet compressor wheel, 76mm inducer, 106mm exducer) paired with a **Pankl Racing Systems titanium connecting rod set** (H-beam, 145mm length, 4340 steel) to handle 1,200+ hp at 14,500 RPM with a **Motec M150 ECU** (full CAN bus integration for ERS and MGU-K/MGU-H control).

Install a **PWR Racing radiator core** (dual-pass, 42mm thickness, 100% aluminum construction) with **Aeroquip Startlite AN-16 braided lines** and a **Setrab 10-row oil cooler** (front-mounted, 500mm x 250mm) to manage thermal loads under sustained 5.5G cornering forces.

Replace the OEM **ZF 8HP75X** transmission with a **Xtrac P1297** 8-speed sequential gearbox (carbon-fiber casing, dog-ring engagement, 12ms shift times) paired with a **AP Racing CP8450 twin-plate carbon clutch** (300mm diameter, 4,500Nm torque capacity) and a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (85% lockup under load).
estetica: Fit a **Vorsteiner MP4-33 Carbon Fiber Aero Kit** (pre-preg autoclave cured, 2x2 twill weave) including a **full-length underbody diffuser** (3-stage Gurney flaps, 40% downforce increase at 200mph) and a **shark fin engine cover** (integrated cooling louvers, 15% drag reduction).

Install **OMP Racing HTE-R carbon fiber seats** (FIA 8862-2009 certified, 6-point harness slots, 1.2kg weight savings per seat) with **Sabelt 6SF/600 harnesses** (2-inch shoulder straps, quick-release camlock) and a **Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel** (350mm diameter, Alcantara grip, integrated Motec dash display).

Apply a **3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap** (matte clear coat overlay, 200-micron thickness) with **custom PPF (Paint Protection Film) by XPEL** on high-impact zones (front splitter, side skirts, rear wing edges) and **BBS FI-R wheels** (13x18 front, 16x20 rear, forged magnesium, 8.5kg per wheel).
